chapter_title: Timing and duration of structured workplace learning
snippet: Structured workplace learning must take place during the school year, which is defined as the period between the first and last school day of the year. Students must be encouraged to undertake structured workplace learning during school time and within the school week. Students may undertake structured workplace learning during the holidays in Terms 1, 2 and 3, but not during the holidays at the end of the year (that is, the Christmas/summer holiday period). If structured workplace learning is undertaken during the school term holidays, the school’s structured workplace learning coordinator (refer to chapter Roles and responsibilities ) must be available as a contact person for the student throughout the arrangement. A structured workplace learning placement may only take place outside the school year if the principal or nominated person is satisfied that it is necessary for the purposes of the relevant accredited course of study.
